name: Newsletter Picks
author: Quips Editorial
description: Quotes from the collections that have been featured in the Quote Unquote newsletter, tagged with their issue number.

quotes.content: I can accept failure. Everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.
quotes.source: I Can't Accept Not Trying: Michael Jordan on the Pursuit of Excellence (1994)
quotes.notes: The line the book's title derives from, from its chapter on fear.

quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Cinema's greatest twist. Often misquoted as 'Luke, I am your father.' Kept secret even from most cast.

quotes.content: I disapprove of what you say, but I will defend to the death your right to say it.
quotes.source: The Friends of Voltaire (1906), written under the pen name S. G. Tallentyre
quotes.notes: Hall coined this as a summary of Voltaire's attitude to free speech; it is very commonly misattributed to Voltaire himself.

quotes.content: Happy families are all alike; every unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
quotes.notes: Tolstoy's aphoristic opening became known as the Anna Karenina principle (Constance Garnett translation).

quotes.content: All your base are belong to us.
quotes.notes: The mistranslated villain line from the 1991 Sega Mega Drive port of Toaplan's arcade game; a foundational internet meme.
